name: Elks National Foundation Most Valuable Student Scholarship
sponsor: Elks National Foundation (Benevolent and Protective Order of Elks)
amount: Up to $50,000 ($12,500/year for 4 years); $4,000 one-time awards also given

eligibility.other_requirements: Must be U.S. citizen; need not be an Elks member; judged on scholarship, leadership, and financial need

stackable_notes: External award; generally stackable. Students should verify with specific institution how outside scholarships are treated.
notes: The $50,000 top award is highly competitive — most scholars receive the $4,000 one-time award. The application goes through a multi-stage process (lodge, district, state, national). Advisors should note the November deadline is quite early; recommend starting application in September.
